differentials.name: Extravesical infrasphincteric ectopic ureter only affects girls, as boys do NOT have infrasphincteric ureteral orifices
differentials.raw: Extravesical infrasphincteric ectopic ureter only affects girls, as boys do NOT have infrasphincteric ureteral orifices (a)  ureter draining upper pole of duplex system → exits below urethral sphincter (90%) (b)  ureter draining single system → ectopic extravesical orifice (10%)

differentials.raw: Miscellaneous posterior urethral valves, urethral stricture, urethral diverticula

context: Associated with pelvic floor dysfunction: Stress Incontinence =  SPHINCTER WEAKNESS INCONTINENCE= URETHRAL INCOMPETENCE =  involuntary loss of urine during physical activity such as coughing, sneezing, laughing, exercise Cause: (a)  male: S/P prostatectomy with damage to distal sphincter (b)  female: congenital bladder neck weakness, pregnancy, childbirth, aging ← changes in anatomic relationship of urethra + bladder base √  opening of bladder neck during coughing √  impairment of milk-back mechanism (= retrograde emptying of urethra during interruption of voiding phase does not occur) √  uret
